description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade features a covered porch supported by thick wooden posts and a low stone wall, providing a sheltered entryway. The exterior walls are constructed from vertical wooden planks in varying shades of brown, with a stone foundation visible at the base. There are a few rectangular windows with simple frames, asymmetrically placed on the sides and rear of the cabin. The roof has a moderate overhang, offering additional protection from the elements. The overall appearance suggests a cozy, traditional structure suitable for residential use in a natural or park-like urban setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, covered porch, stone foundation, and asymmetrically placed windows. The exterior features vertical wood planks and a reddish-brown shingled roof.
description_view_0: The front view shows the covered porch with wooden posts, a low stone wall, and the main entrance under the gable roof.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the long, uninterrupted wooden wall with a single window near the rear and the roof's overhang.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a single window centered on the back wall, with the stone foundation and vertical wood planks clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals another window and a partial view of the porch, with the wooden wall and roof overhang extending along the side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, covered in reddish-brown shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed: one on the rear wall, one on the left side near the rear, and one on the right side near the front; all are single and medium-sized.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the covered porch.
